title: any
text: any Uniface data type for any kind of data. It can used as a parameter/variable data type in all types of modules. Use Use in the params blocks of functions and the variables block for component variables. To define an any global variable, choose $ in the Data Type list of the editor. Description A variable or parameter with this data type can be assigned a value of any other data type, at which point it takes on the data type of its value. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
